# Hopium

> Hopium is a parimutuel prediction market platform where users bet on real-world outcomes using Telegram Stars.

## What Hopium Is

Hopium is a prediction market platform. Users browse markets about real-world events (crypto prices, sports outcomes, political events, culture, and tech), pick a side (YES or NO), and stake Telegram Stars on their prediction. When the event resolves, winners split the pool proportionally.

## Key Concepts

- Parimutuel betting: All stakes go into a shared pool. Winners split the pool proportionally to their stake. No market maker, no order book.
- Telegram Stars: The currency used for all bets. Users deposit and withdraw via Telegram.
- Categories: Crypto, Sports, Politics, Culture, Tech.
- Resolution: Each market has clear resolution criteria and a resolution date. Markets resolve based on verifiable real-world outcomes.

## Platform

- Web app: https://hopium.bet (desktop-optimized, browse markets without an account)
- Telegram Mini App: The same platform accessible inside Telegram on mobile devices
- Shared accounts: Users have the same account, bets, and balance across web and Telegram

## Public Pages

- Home (https://hopium.bet/): Browse all active prediction markets with category and country filters.
- Market Detail (https://hopium.bet/bet/{slug}): View a specific market with odds, pool size, resolution criteria, and place bets.
- Leaderboard (https://hopium.bet/leaders): Rankings by profit, win rate, and streak across 7-day, 30-day, and all-time windows.
- Share Links (https://hopium.bet/share/{id}): Shareable cards for winning predictions and streaks.

## How Betting Works

1. Browse markets on the home page. Filter by category (Crypto, Sports, Politics, Culture, Tech) or country.
2. Pick a market and choose YES or NO.
3. Stake Telegram Stars (minimum 10 Stars per bet).
4. If your side wins when the market resolves, you receive a proportional share of the total pool.
5. Potential payout depends on the ratio of your stake to the total stake on your side.

## API

Public market data is available at https://api.hopium.app/v1/bet/ (JSON, no authentication required for reading).
